title: Finally Done
content: The portfolio is live! After weeks of building with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, and MySQL, I've converted my local MAMP project into a fully deployed static site. This journey taught me so much about full-stack development and deployment workflows.

title: Learning About Databases
content: This week I dove deep into relational database design as part of my Eurostar 2030 project. Designing schemas, writing SQL queries, and understanding normalization has given me a whole new appreciation for how data-driven applications work behind the scenes.

title: My Second Blog Post
content: I've been exploring the intersection of AI and web development. As a Computer Science with AI student, it's fascinating to see how tools like Bayesian Networks and search algorithms can be applied to real-world problems beyond the classroom.

title: Welcome to My Blog
content: Hi there! This is my first blog post. I'm Sama, a Computer Science with AI student at Queen Mary University of London. I built this blog from scratch using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, and MySQL. I'll be sharing my journey through university, projects I'm working on, and things I'm learning along the way.
